rationale: The citing paper is a methodological Monte Carlo comparison of latent moderation estimators, while the cited paper is a substantive private-banking study on customer participation/empowerment; the notes show no shared method contribution that would make the 2019 paper a likely technical source. With only a bare DOI reference match (no contextual quote) and given the citing paper’s broad review of many marketing moderation articles (2015–2020), this citation most plausibly serves as an example/background mention rather than a substantive dependency.
